name: server-monitor
description: Full-stack server monitoring app (FastAPI + React) deployed as a single Heroku app.

SECRET_KEY.description: JWT signing key (use a strong random value).

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string from Heroku Postgres.

APP_BASE_URL.description: Public app URL for links in email alerts, e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Alert recipient emails. Use comma-separated values for multiple recipients.

EMAIL_ALERT_REPEAT_MINUTES.description: Reminder interval in minutes while a server remains down or slow.
